# terrible_community_general_jabber (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `msg` (String) The message body.
- `password` (String) Password for user to connect.
- `to` (String) User ID or name of the room, when using room use a slash to indicate your nick.
- `user` (String) User as which to connect.

### Optional

- `encoding` (String) Message encoding.
- `host` (String) Host to connect, overrides user info.
- `port` (Number) Port to connect to, overrides default.
